name: StellarNetworkEmulator
activities: Track snapshot provenance (fromSnapshot, cleared on pushBlock)

name: SnapshotCache
activities: Track registered snapshot metadata (name → parentSnapName, resolver)
Load snapshots from disk with recursive parent resolution
Cache loaded snapshots in memory for process lifetime (REQT-1.2.10.3)
Apply incremental blocks to parent UTxO state (REQT-1.2.10.1)

name: namedRecords
notes: Persisted with snapshot, restored on load

name: CapoTestHelper → SnapshotCache
payload: snapshot name, namedRecords (cache key computed internally via registry)

name: Fresh Bootstrap
steps: Test calls reusableBootstrap()
CapoTestHelper resolves script dependencies
SnapshotCache check → miss
Capo runs bootstrap
CachedHeliosProgram compiles
StellarNetworkEmulator captures snapshot
SnapshotCache stores snapshot + namedRecords

name: Cached Bootstrap
steps: Test calls reusableBootstrap()
CapoTestHelper detects helperState.bootstrapped = true
CapoTestHelper calls restoreFrom(snapshotName)
SnapshotCache returns cached snapshot (in-memory or disk)
CapoTestHelper restores to StellarNetworkEmulator
CapoTestHelper transfers actor wallets (in restoreFrom())

name: resolveScriptDependencies
returnType: CacheKeyInputs { bundles: Array<{name, sourceHash, params}>, extra?: Record }
discussion: Takes helper as explicit argument (not bound) to ensure correct lifetime - uses CURRENT helper, not one from registration time

name: SnapshotCache.find
behavior: First checks loadedSnapshots Map (returns cached if present); on disk load: touches directory if mtime > 1 day; resolves parent chain via registry (recursive); passes helper to resolvers for cache key computation; applies incremental blocks to parent UTxO state (not full rebuild); verifies parentHash matches loaded parent's snapshotHash; verifies final blockHashes[-1] equals snapshotHash for integrity (returns null on any mismatch to trigger rebuild); caches result in loadedSnapshots before returning

name: SnapshotCache.store
behavior: Computes path via registry (parent path + name + cacheKey); creates directory; writes snapshot.json with incremental blocks

name: SnapshotCache.has
behavior: Checks if snapshot directory exists; resolves path via registry

name: SnapshotCache.delete
behavior: Deletes snapshot directory and all children (rm -rf); resolves path via registry; returns true if deleted

name: SnapshotCache.register
signature: (snapshotName: string, metadata: { parentSnapName: ParentSnapName, resolveScriptDependencies?: ScriptDependencyResolver }) => void
behavior: Registers snapshot metadata for just-in-time resolution. Called in @hasNamedSnapshot decorator wrapper (SnapWrap) before requesting the snapshot.

name: Block hashes
notes: Parallel tracking via blockHashes[] for Helios interface compatibility

name: SnapshotDecoratorOptions
definition: type SnapshotDecoratorOptions = { actor: string; parentSnapName: ParentSnapName; internal?: boolean; resolveScriptDependencies?: ScriptDependencyResolver }
discussion: Decorator options for @hasNamedSnapshot. actor: 'default' → setDefaultActor(), other → setActor(name). internal: true skips reusableBootstrap() for bootstrap-internal snapshots (prevents infinite recursion). parentSnapName explicitly declares parent snapshot.

name: CachedSnapshot
definition: type CachedSnapshot = { snapshot: NetworkSnapshot; namedRecords: Record<string, string>; parentSnapName: ParentSnapName; parentHash: string | null; parentCacheKey: string | null; snapshotHash: string }
discussion: Stored in hierarchical directories: {parentPath}/{name}-{key}/snapshot.json. parentCacheKey: DO NOT USE - probably obsolete (with hierarchical dirs, parent path is implicit). parentHash is verified on load to detect stale cache—if mismatch, find() returns null to trigger rebuild.

name: Snapshot provenance
notes: fromSnapshot field tracks which snapshot the current state was loaded from; cleared on pushBlock() when state diverges

name: CapoTestHelper.getSnapshotCacheKey
behavior: Recomputes cache key for built-in snapshots using deterministic resolvers and stored block hashes. Returns null for 'genesis'. App snapshots return SNAP_DELEGATES cache key (their parent).
discussion: Eliminates need for Map<string,string> to track cache keys—all inputs available for recomputation.

name: Loaded snapshots
notes: In-memory Map inside SnapshotCache, keyed by {name}:{cacheKey} for REQT-1.2.10.3; SnapshotCache shared via helperState.snapCache; composite key ensures different seeds/configs produce different cache entries; avoids redundant disk reads and tx reconstruction within tests sharing the same SnapshotCache instance

name: Disk Chain Load (cold cache)
steps: Test calls snapToX(name)
SnapshotCache resolves parent chain and computes cache key
Checks loadedSnapshots with composite key {name}:{cacheKey} → miss
Recursive find() down to genesis (each computing its cache key)
At each level: read JSON, deserialize blocks, apply incremental to parent UTxO state
Cache result in loadedSnapshots with composite key
Return CachedSnapshot with accumulated state

name: Memory-Assisted Load (warm cache)
steps: Test calls snapToX(name)
SnapshotCache resolves parent chain and computes cache keys
Checks loadedSnapshots for parent with composite key → hit
Reuse cached parent's full UTxO state
Read only this snapshot's JSON from disk
Deserialize incremental blocks
Apply incremental blocks to parent state
Cache result in loadedSnapshots with composite key

name: applyIncrementalBlocks
signature: (parentState: { allUtxos, consumedUtxos, addressUtxos }, incrementalBlocks: EmulatorTx[][]) => { allUtxos, consumedUtxos, addressUtxos }
behavior: Applies incremental blocks to parent UTxO state without full rebuild. Processes each tx: marks inputs as consumed, adds outputs as new UTxOs.
discussion: Reduces chain load from O(n²) to O(n) by avoiding redundant processing of parent blocks.

name: PRNG seed determinism
notes: Single seed lifecycle: StellarTestHelper.randomSeed (default 42) → emulator #seed → evolves with PRNG calls → snapshot stores evolved seed → restore continues PRNG. Cache key uses starting seed (stable); snapshot stores evolved seed (continuity).

name: Cache Invalidation
steps: Source file changes → bundle hash changes (via getCacheKeyInputs())
Next test run computes new cache key (via resolveScriptDependencies())
New cache key not found → cache miss → rebuild and store under new key
(FUTURE: REQT-1.2.7.2) Old cache directories age out (> 1 week) and get cleaned up
discussion: Touch mechanism (REQT-1.2.7.1) keeps active directories fresh; cleanup command not yet implemented.

name: Key inputs
notes: key-inputs.json stored per snapshot directory; enables debugging cache misses and accessing actor list on load

name: Offchain data
notes: offchain.json stored per snapshot directory; test helper restoration data (e.g., actor wallet keys) that doesn't affect cache validity; merged from parent chain on load

name: Actor wallet keys
notes: Stored in offchainData.actorWallets; replaces PRNG regeneration hack; enables fast restoration via makeBip32PrivateKey(hexToBytes(key))

name: WU3: Actor Wallet Keys Work Unit
WU4: Key Inputs Storage Work Unit
WU5: Offchain Data Storage Work Unit
WU6: Cross-Process Capo Reconstruction Work Unit
F13: Composite Cache Key Work Unit
Actor transfer semantics
notes: Actor transfer in restoreFrom() depends on helper identity: same helper (this===previousHelper) just loads snapshot; different helpers always transfer actors. ACTORS_ALREADY_MOVED marker is per-helper, not per-network. helperState is shared for caching but actors belong to specific helper instances.
